the_day_unfolds.light: Warm golden morning across meadow, sanctuary and pier; clear skies, soft breeze, love and play before the big water.
Gold drains into cold blue-grey as wind, rain and distance grow; Keen’s control slips and the world becomes too large.
Darkest storm-blue and underwater grey; the vacant cuffs glow faint aqua from remembered love before any crystal is awarded.
Storm breaks toward warmth; the shore beacon, welcome circle and aquamarine award turn cold rain into shared light.
Warm golden-hour calm, brighter than the start but with wet leaves and sea-memory still visible.
